title: Podman requires optional field in images
body:
### Issue Description

Problem:
https://github.com/aws/aws-lambda-base-images/issues/2

I have the same in my build system after upgrading Podman (together with switching to Fedora 39)

The history field is really optoional.
https://github.com/opencontainers/image-spec/blob/main/config.md#properties


### Steps to reproduce the issue

`podman build -t xxxxxxx:master  /some/dir`

### Describe the results you received

```
STEP 3/6: ENV DNF_VAR_UTM_REPO_PASSWORD=******
Error: committing container for step {Env:[PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin DNF_VAR_UTM_REPO_USER=mmarkk] Command:env Args:[DNF_VAR_UTM_REPO_PASSWORD ******] Flags:[] Attrs:map[] Message:ENV DNF_VAR_UTM_REPO_PASSWORD ****** Heredocs:[] Original:ENV DNF_VAR_UTM_REPO_PASSWORD=******}: copying layers and metadata for container "eb8d6cae134c5ac4d9b2235f7741e2b4a1ceae30e123833a9095d0125e68d848": initializing source containers-storage:481f6be7ace7-working-container: internal error: history lists 0 non-empty layers, but we have 2 layers on disk
```

### Describe the results you expected

Describe the results you expected

comments.body:
Hi @socketpair , Could you please try using `--omit-history` with `podman build` and `buildah build` to remove optional history field and check if it works for you. `--omit-history` was added here, see https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4028 for more details.

Thanks
